creator: josef.kraus@bafl.bund.de
text:
Port make file expects ucd-snmp-3.5.3.tar.gz but file from cd
is ucd-snmp-3.5.3.tgz,
after renaming the file 
make says checksum is not correct
make with argument to ignore checksum does not succeed when
make tries to apply patches there is no directory:
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for ucd-snmp-3.5.3
patch: **** can't cd to /usr/ports/net/ucd-snmp/work/ucd-snmp-3.5.3: No such file or directory

How-To-Repeat: Try to install this port
